app.name: bizbeecms
app.description: Cloudflare-native multi-site B2B whitelabel CMS — per-Site CMS instance

home.title: bizbeecms · CMS
home.intro: A whitelabel CMS instance. The ProjectManager deploys one of these per Site to Cloudflare. For now this is the default Next.js install.

chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.subtitle: Describe what you want and the assistant builds it — components, pages, translations.
chat.empty: Ask the assistant to create a component or compose a page.

widget.title: AI Assistant
widget.subtitle: Build with chat — on any page.
widget.creditTitle: This Site's AI spend this month, against its monthly quota
widget.overrideTitle: A saved system-prompt version is active for your session only.

prompts.title: System prompt versions
prompts.help: Save and switch full system-prompt versions for your session only. End users keep the default.
prompts.active: A saved version is active for this session.
prompts.label: Version label

enterMode.aria: Toggle Enter key behaviour: send message or insert newline

attach.textOnly: This model is text-only — it can't read attachments.
attach.readDisk: Attach a file to read (from disk)
attach.readGallery: Attach a file to read (from gallery)
attach.insertGalleryHint: Adds the file's URL for the assistant to use on the page

gallery.readTitle: Choose files for the assistant to read
gallery.empty: No media yet. Upload images in the Media library first.
gallery.selectedCount: {count, plural, =0 {Nothing selected} one {# selected} other {# selected}}
gallery.searchPlaceholder: Search media by description or tag…
gallery.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}"? This removes it from the library permanently.

contentLocales.title: Content languages
contentLocales.subtitle: The user-facing languages this site publishes content in (separate from the admin UI language).
contentLocales.addPlaceholder: Language code, e.g. fi or pt-br
contentLocales.invalidCode: Enter a valid language code (2–3 letters, optional region).
contentLocales.duplicate: That language is already in the list.
contentLocales.pageSlugConflict: Can't save: {slugs} already in use as a page URL. Rename that page first.

robots.title: robots.txt
robots.subtitle: Control which crawlers can access this site. Served at /robots.txt.
robots.sitemapNote: A Sitemap: line pointing at /sitemap.xml is added automatically — don't add your own.
robots.overrideHelp: When filled, this text is served verbatim and replaces the rules above. Leave empty to use the rules.
robots.overrideActive: Override is active — rules below are ignored.

redirects.title: Redirects
redirects.subtitle: 301/302 URL redirects. Slug renames add these automatically; add or remove your own here.
redirects.addHelp: Both must start with /. No self-loops or chains — a From can't already be a target, and a To can't already be a source.

errors.selfLoop: From and To can't be the same path.
errors.duplicate: A redirect from that path already exists — delete it first.
errors.chainFromIsTarget: That From path is already the target of another redirect (would create a chain).
errors.chainToIsSource: That To path already redirects elsewhere (would create a chain).

verification.title: Search engine verification
verification.subtitle: Paste the verification token from each search engine's webmaster tools. It's emitted as a meta tag on every published page. Leave blank to skip a provider.

google.label: Google Search Console
google.hint: The content value of the google-site-verification meta tag.

bing.label: Bing Webmaster Tools
bing.hint: The content value of the msvalidate.01 meta tag.

yandex.label: Yandex Webmaster
yandex.hint: The content value of the yandex-verification meta tag.

rateLimit.title: Bot rate limiting
rateLimit.subtitle: Control how aggressively the site throttles bots and scrapers that hammer your public pages. Real visitors and verified search crawlers are unaffected; over the limit gets an HTTP 429 with a retry hint. Admin and API traffic is never throttled.

off.label: Off
off.help: No rate limiting. Every request is served — use only if a proxy in front already handles abuse.

normal.label: Normal
normal.help: The default. Caps each IP at 100 page requests per minute — generous enough for any human or legitimate crawler.

strict.label: Strict
strict.help: Cuts abusive IPs off sooner (about 40 page requests per minute). Pick this if a scraper is getting through the normal cap.

rateLimit.note: Takes effect on the deployed site after the next release, and may take up to 30 seconds to propagate across the edge.

notFoundPage.title: 404 page
notFoundPage.subtitle: Choose a published page to serve as this site's branded 404 (not-found) page. Visitors who hit a missing or renamed URL see it, with an HTTP 404 status and search engines told not to index it. Leave as the default for a plain 404.
notFoundPage.selectHint: Only published pages can be selected.

errors.notPublished: That page is no longer published. Pick another or reload.

seoAudit.title: SEO audit
seoAudit.subtitle: A read-only health report over your published pages. It finds pages nothing links to, dead internal links, missing meta titles and descriptions, and images without alt text. Fix each in the page's settings — nothing here changes automatically.
seoAudit.allClear: No issues found. Every published page has meta text, no broken internal links, no orphans, and every image has alt text.

orphans.title: Orphan pages
orphans.description: Published pages no other page links to — reachable only via navigation or the sitemap. Add an internal link from a relevant page.

brokenLinks.title: Broken internal links
brokenLinks.description: Links in page content pointing at a path no published page serves — visitors and crawlers get a 404. Fix or remove the link.

missingMeta.title: Missing meta text
missingMeta.description: Published pages missing a meta title or description for a content locale — search results show poor or no snippet.
missingMeta.empty: Every published page has meta text in every locale.

missingAlt.title: Images without alt text
missingAlt.description: Image blocks with no alt text — bad for accessibility and image search. Add alt text in the block settings.

theme.title: Theme
theme.subtitle: Override the published site's color tokens without a rebuild. Leave a field empty to use the default. Accepts hex (#1a2b3c) or oklch()/rgb()/hsl() values.
theme.overrideCount: {count, plural, =0 {No overrides — using defaults} one {# override} other {# overrides}}
theme.previewBody: Sample text in a card on a raised surface.

fonts.title: Typography
fonts.subtitle: Pick fonts for the published site. Body is the default everywhere, Heading applies to h1–h6, Accent is opt-in for highlighted text (components use it via the font-accent class).
fonts.sample: The quick brown fox — ÄÖÕŠŽ äöõšž 0123
fonts.selfHostNote: On save, the font files are downloaded once and self-hosted with your site — visitors never connect to Google Fonts.

media.title: Media library
media.subtitle: Upload images to this site and reference them in components by their URL.
media.uploadHint: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF or SVG, up to {max}MB.
media.empty: No media yet. Upload an image to get started.

brand.title: Brand & AI persona
brand.subtitle: Describe this Site's identity once. The AI assistant uses it to make every generated component and page match your brand.

placeholder.design: e.g. Minimal, generous whitespace, rounded cards
placeholder.aiPersona: e.g. Always suggest accessible contrast; prefer short sections

hint.brandName: The name of your brand or Site.
hint.tagline: A one-line summary of what this Site is about.
hint.voice: How copy should sound — tone and personality.
hint.design: The visual style the AI should aim for.
hint.aiPersona: Extra behavioral guidance for the AI builder.

components.title: Components
components.subtitle: Browse your components as live previews, export a selection as a ZIP, or import a kit from another site.
components.empty: No components yet. Create one in the AI chat, then export it here.
components.importHint: Upload a component ZIP (.kit.zip) or paste a bundle JSON. Imports are validated before saving; a ZIP also installs the media assets it bundles.
components.importEmpty: Paste a bundle or choose a file first.
components.assetDepsHint: This component references the media assets below. Make sure they exist on this site (upload them, or they will appear broken).
components.componentDepsHint: This component renders the components below, which are not installed on this site. Import them first, or they will render as hidden placeholders.
components.rebindHint: For each asset this bundle references, keep it as-is, point it at one of this site's media files, or drop it. Then re-import to apply.
components.previewMissingDeps: Missing component deps this site needs: {deps}
components.previewAssets: References {count} asset(s) — upload them or rebind after install.
components.previewSkipped: {count} component(s) failed validation and will be skipped.
components.exportedZip: Exported {components} component(s) and {assets} asset(s) as a ZIP.
components.exportUnbundled: {count} referenced asset(s) are missing on this site and were not bundled: {keys}
components.zipMissingKit: No kit.json in this ZIP — it isn't a component kit export.
components.zipLoaded: ZIP loaded — {count} bundled asset file(s) will be installed after import.
components.assetsInstalled: {count} bundled asset(s) installed or already present.
components.previewAssetsBundled: References {count} asset(s) — bundled in this ZIP and installed automatically.

adminAuth.forbiddenBody: You're signed in, but your account doesn't have access to manage this site. Ask a site administrator to grant you access.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage this site.
login.errorNetwork: Couldn't reach the server. Try again.
login.googleDenied: That Google account isn't allowed to sign in here. Ask a site administrator for an invitation.
login.googleInvitePending: You have a pending invitation — open the invite link in your email to finish setting up your account.
login.errorTooMany: Too many sign-in attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.

adminNav.indexSubtitle: Manage this site's content, components and configuration.

desc.components: Export components as portable bundles, import them, or install starter kits.
desc.media: Upload images to this site and reference them in components by URL.
desc.settings: Content languages, theme color overrides, and brand & AI persona.
desc.pageBuilder: Compose pages visually from blocks and components.
desc.collections: Define typed data collections, fill them with content, and query them.
desc.dataSources: Define external APIs as data sources and manage their saved requests.
desc.chatAgents: Configure guest-facing chatbots: prompt, model, limits, and what they may query.

pageBuilder.title: Page Builder
pageBuilder.draftBadgeHint: This component has unpublished edits — the preview shows them, the live site doesn't yet.

publishDialog.title: Publish component changes too?
publishDialog.intro: This page uses components with unpublished edits. The preview shows them, but the published page won't until the components are published — and publishing a component updates it on every page that uses it.
publishDialog.usageNone: Not used on any other published page.
publishDialog.usageOn: Also used on {count, plural, one {# other published page:} other {# other published pages:}}
publishDialog.publishBoth: Publish page + {count, plural, one {# component} other {# components}}

bind.title: Bind to data source
bind.help: Fill this block's props from a data source — the first matching collection item, or a mapped API response.
bind.noCollections: No collections yet — create one in Collections.
bind.noProps: This component declares no props to bind.
bind.noSources: No collections or API sources yet — create one under Collections or Data Sources.
bind.noRequests: This source has no saved requests — add one under Data Sources.
bind.itemsPathHint: Dot-path to the rows array when the response nests it, e.g. list
bind.apiMapHelp: Map response field paths to props — load a sample to get suggestions.
bind.sampleFailed: Sample fetch failed — check the request and its parameters.

list.title: List
list.help: Repeat a component once per item from the selected data source.
list.itemListHint: Aggregates the rows into one schema.org ItemList for search engines. Needs a JSON-LD component as the list template.
list.presentationCombobox: Combobox — select from rows in a dropdown
list.presentationComboboxHint: Each row renders as {template} inside a selectable dropdown; the combobox owns selection, search and limits.
list.cbLabelExprHelp: A template for the chip text — use {syntax} for row values, e.g. {example}. No backticks needed. Overrides the label field.

form.title: Form target
form.help: Send this form's submissions to a data source: an API saved request (fired server-side — secrets stay on the server) or a collection that accepts public submissions (entries land as draft items for review).
form.fieldsHelpApi: Name each input inside the form's content exactly after the saved request's placeholders — fields are matched by name, and every placeholder must be supplied.
form.fieldsHelpCollection: Inputs named after the collection's fields become the draft item; unknown names are dropped.
form.publicOff: This collection does not accept public submissions yet — submissions will be rejected until you enable the toggle in
form.contentHelp: Its inputs become the form's fields, and a submit button inside it triggers the form natively.
form.messagesHelp: Shown inline after an in-page submit. Leave empty to use the defaults shown.
form.redirectHint: A same-site path starting with / — used after a no-JavaScript submit instead of returning to the page.
form.redirectInvalid: Must be a same-site path starting with a single / — this value will be ignored.

guestChat.title: AI chat
guestChat.noAgents: No chat agents yet — create one in
guestChat.label: Title
guestChat.welcomeHelp: Leave blank to use the agent's welcome message

pageBuilder.componentsEmpty: No components yet — import a kit or component.
pageBuilder.emptyCanvas: Select a page from the top bar to start editing.
pageBuilder.layersEmpty: No blocks yet — add a Section from the Components rail.

create.invalidSlug: Slug must be lowercase letters, digits or hyphens.
create.slugIsLocaleCode: This slug matches a content-language code, so its URL is reserved for that language. Pick a different slug.

pageBuilder.previewEmpty: The page preview appears here once a page is selected.
pageBuilder.blockEmpty: Select a block in the Layers panel to edit its properties.
pageBuilder.pageEmpty: Page settings appear here once a page is selected.

page.cacheHint: Serve the published page from Cloudflare's edge cache for this long. Keep off for pages showing live data.
page.deleteConfirm: Delete this page? This can't be undone.
page.localizedSlugsHint: Per-locale URL slug for this page. Leave empty to use the default slug.
page.localizedSlugInvalid: Localized slug for "{locale}" must be a lowercase URL segment (letters, digits, hyphens)

versions.label: Version history
versions.empty: No published versions yet. Publish to create the first.
versions.restoreConfirm: Create an editable draft from this version? Your current draft will be replaced.

pageBuilder.seoEmpty: SEO settings appear here once a page is selected.
pageBuilder.addSectionFirst: Add a Section first, then drop components into it.
pageBuilder.seoMetaImageEmpty: No image set for this language.
pageBuilder.seoMetaImageGalleryEmpty: No images in the media library yet.
pageBuilder.seoNoindexHint: Adds a noindex tag and excludes this page from the sitemap and search-engine notifications.
pageBuilder.ogAutoHint: When no image is set above, a screenshot of the published page is used. Regenerate it after a redesign.
pageBuilder.ogErrManualWins: A manual image is set for this language — it always wins. Remove it to use an auto screenshot.
pageBuilder.ogErrNoUrl: This page has no fixed URL for this language (dynamic pages can't be screenshotted).
pageBuilder.ogErrNoBinding: Auto screenshots need a deployed site on a paid plan — unavailable here.
pageBuilder.ogErrNoOrigin: The site origin isn't known yet — publish or deploy the site first.
pageBuilder.ogErrError: Could not generate the screenshot. Try again.
pageBuilder.sectionRowsHint: This section's rows and their columns are managed in the Layers tree.

colVisibility.label: Visibility
colVisibility.hint: Hide this column on the selected screen sizes.

deleteColumn.confirm: Delete this column and its components?

deleteNode.confirmSection: Delete this section and everything in it?

pageBuilder.componentNoProps: This component has no configurable properties.
pageBuilder.columnAlignHint: Override this column's alignment (defaults to the Section).

translate.empty: Nothing to translate in the source language.

translateField.emptyHint: No {locale} text yet — use Translate, or type it in.
translateField.timeout: Translation timed out — the model didn't respond. Try again.

collections.title: Collections
collections.subtitle: Define typed data collections, manage their fields, and edit their content.
collections.offline: Connect a live database to manage this collection.
collections.empty: No collections yet. Create your first one.
collections.name: Name
collections.namePlaceholder: e.g. Blog posts or Team members
collections.publicSubmissionsHint: Allow page Forms to submit draft items into this collection from the public site.
collections.confirmDelete: Delete collection “{name}” and all its data? This cannot be undone.
collections.confirmDeleteItem: Delete this item? This cannot be undone.
collections.confirmDropField: Drop field “{name}” and all its data? The table is rebuilt; this cannot be undone.
collections.sqlConsoleHint: Run a read-only SELECT over your collection tables. Only SELECT on content_* tables is allowed.
collections.sqlPlaceholder: SELECT * FROM content_blog_posts WHERE status = 'published' LIMIT 50

dataSources.title: Data sources
dataSources.subtitle: Define external APIs and saved requests, then bind components to them like collections.
dataSources.forbidden: You don't have permission to manage data sources.
dataSources.empty: No data sources yet. Add an external API to bind components to it.
dataSources.name: Name
dataSources.secretHelp: Stored encrypted and never shown again. Used server-side only.
dataSources.deleteSourceConfirm: Delete “{name}” and all its saved requests?
dataSources.pathHelp: Appended to the base URL. Tokens like {example} are filled from component props at render.
dataSources.queryHelp: One per line as key=value. Placeholder tokens are filled from component props.
dataSources.bodyHelp: JSON sent as the request body. Placeholder tokens are JSON-escaped when filled.
dataSources.testHelp: Runs the live request without caching. Fill a value for each placeholder, then use the response to pick dot-paths (for example main.temp) when mapping fields to component props.
dataSources.purgeAllConfirm: Purge every cached API response? Pages will fetch fresh data from the external APIs on their next render.

apiKeys.title: MCP
apiKeys.subtitle: Bearer keys for the remote MCP server. Each key gives full programmatic access to this site — share it only with trusted tools.
apiKeys.forbidden: You don't have permission to manage API keys. Ask an Admin.
apiKeys.revokeConfirm: Revoke the key “{label}”? Any tool using it will stop working immediately.
apiKeys.mintedWarning: This is the only time the key is shown. Copy it and store it somewhere safe — you can't see it again.
apiKeys.connectIntro: Add this site to Claude Code as a remote MCP server. Replace bzb_YOUR_KEY with a key you created above — all the CMS assistant tools then appear in Claude Code.
apiKeys.connectJsonLabel: Or add it to your MCP config (.mcp.json):
apiKeys.connectHint: One key = one site. This URL manages only this site. Revoke a key above to cut off access immediately.

inviteEmail.subject: You're invited to BizbeeCMS
inviteEmail.subjectWithDomain: {domain}: You are invited to use BizBeeCMS

resetEmail.subject: Reset your BizbeeCMS password

acceptInvite.title: Accept your invitation
acceptInvite.subtitle: Set a password for {email} to finish creating your account.
acceptInvite.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 10 characters.
acceptInvite.errorExpired: This invitation has expired. Ask for a new one.
acceptInvite.errorAccepted: This invitation has already been used.
acceptInvite.errorEmailTaken: An account already exists for this email.
acceptInvite.errorGeneric: Couldn't accept the invitation. Try again.
acceptInvite.errorNetwork: Couldn't reach the server. Try again.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage who can access this site's CMS. Invite teammates, set their role, or remove access.
users.forbidden: You don't have permission to manage users. Ask an Admin or Manager.
users.inviteSent: Invite sent. They'll get an email with an accept link.
users.inviteCreatedNoEmail: Invite created. Email isn't configured yet — share the accept link from the server logs.
users.removeConfirm: Remove {email}? They'll lose access to this site's CMS immediately.
users.revokeConfirm: Revoke the invite for {email}? Their accept link will stop working.

err.emailInvalid: That doesn't look like a valid email.
err.notAllowed: You're not allowed to invite users.
err.emailTaken: That person already has an account.
err.alreadyInvited: That person already has a pending invite.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to set a new password.
forgotPassword.success: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.errorGeneric: Couldn't send the reset link. Try again.
forgotPassword.errorNetwork: Couldn't reach the server. Try again.
forgotPassword.errorTooMany: Too many reset requests for this email. Please wait a few minutes and try again.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 10 characters.
resetPassword.errorTokenInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
resetPassword.errorGeneric: Couldn't reset your password. Try again.
resetPassword.errorNetwork: Couldn't reach the server. Try again.

googleClient.title: Google sign-in
googleClient.subtitle: Let your team sign in with your organization's Google account.
googleClient.forbidden: You don't have permission to manage Google sign-in.
googleClient.help: Register your own Google OAuth 2.0 client and paste its credentials here. Use "<APP_ORIGIN>/api/auth/google/callback" as the authorized redirect URI. The secret is stored encrypted and never shown again.
googleClient.clientSecretSetPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the current secret
googleClient.clearConfirm: Remove the stored Google client credentials? Google sign-in will be disabled until you add them again.

mediaSettings.title: Media
mediaSettings.subtitle: Choose the AI model that describes uploaded images so they’re searchable.
mediaSettings.forbidden: You don’t have permission to manage media settings.

imageModel.label: Image description model
imageModel.hint: A vision model reads each uploaded image and writes a short description used for media search.

imageGenModel.label: Image generation model
imageGenModel.hint: The AI assistant uses this model to generate images on demand; generated images land in the gallery and are described and tagged automatically.

develop.title: Develop components
develop.subtitle: Select a component to preview it with its placeholder data, or delete unwanted ones.
develop.confirmDelete: Delete component "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
develop.noPlaceholderData: This component has no placeholder data, so the preview may be empty. Ask the assistant to add propsSchema defaults.
develop.selectPrompt: Select a component to preview it.
develop.propsHint: Edit the placeholder values the preview binds. Saved as the component's defaults.

jsonld.previewHint: The <script type="application/ld+json"> this component renders on the page, with placeholder props bound in.
jsonld.invalid: The template (with placeholder props) isn't valid JSON yet, so no structured data is emitted. Fix the JSON to preview it.
jsonld.empty: Add a JSON-LD template to preview the emitted structured data.

capture.caption: Here is "{name}" rendered at desktop, tablet, and mobile widths. Review how it looks at each size and refine the component so it works well across all of them.

draft.usageNone: Not used on any live page yet.
draft.usageCount: Publishing updates {count, plural, one {# live page} other {# live pages}}: {pages}.

translateModel.label: Translation model
translateModel.hint: This AI model translates page and component text into the site’s other languages.

assistantChats.title: Assistant chats
assistantChats.subtitle: Conversations with the CMS AI assistant — daily usage, and every stored transcript with all messages and tool calls, ready to review, download, or delete.

exportImport.title: Export / Import
exportImport.subtitle: Export this site's entire content database as a portable file, or import one to replace this site's content.
exportImport.exportSubtitle: Downloads one site.zip file with pages, components, collections, settings, data sources, prompt history, and every gallery image.
exportImport.importSubtitle: Replaces this site's ENTIRE content — pages, components, collections, settings, data sources — with the contents of an exported file. This cannot be undone.
exportImport.badJson: That file isn't a valid site export (zip or JSON).
exportImport.willDestroy: Will be replaced on this site
exportImport.collectionCapExceeded: This import has more collections than the 100-table limit and cannot be executed.
exportImport.secretsHint: These data sources will import without their secret — re-enter it after import in Data sources.
exportImport.pickAssetsBundled: {count} gallery file(s) bundled in the zip — no separate upload needed.
exportImport.pickAssetsLabel: Gallery files to upload ({count} referenced by this export)
exportImport.pickAssetsHint: {picked} file(s) selected — select all the files you downloaded from the source site's export.
exportImport.confirmLabel: Type the site name to confirm —
exportImport.blankSiteName: (no site name set on the export — this import cannot be confirmed)
exportImport.blankSiteNameError: This export has no site name set, so it can't be confirmed or imported.
exportImport.secretsReminder: Remember to re-enter data source secrets in Data sources.

llms.title: llms.txt
llms.subtitle: Edit the template served at /llms.txt for AI crawlers. Leave empty to use the auto-generated page list.
llms.emptyHint: Leave the template empty to serve the auto-generated /llms.txt (brand header + page list).
llms.varsHelp: Click a variable to insert it at the cursor. Same {{slot}} syntax as components.
llms.unknownSlots: Unknown variable(s): {slots}. Remove them or use a variable from the list.

vars.origin: The site's public origin (scheme + host, no trailing slash).
vars.defaultLocale: The site's default content locale code.
vars.pageTree: The published-page list as Markdown links to each page's .md variant.
